---
title: "Marianne von Nathusius"
---

## Marianne von Nathusius

### Description

proposed German translator of <i>A Book of Golden Deeds</i>

### Biography

She was probably a relation of the German novelist and dogooder Marie (Scheele) Nathusius (1817-1857).

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 8 1865
- Letter from Febry 7th 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
